narrative:
Noble County has 7,808 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 32.0% of registrants.
